column1: # goal: Improve elite-clone product quality and operational UX through verified foreground iterations
# stop_condition: run until user interrupts or time budget ends
# rollback_policy: apply_patch-only edits with manual discard before record

column7: description
Baseline established at 0 retained verified improvements; build already passing before loop launch.
Added partner candidate spotlight panel with member drilldown, recent application/coffee chat context, and quick filters for operator triage.
Added application status history to candidate dashboard cards so users can see recent stage changes and last update timestamps without opening notifications separately.
Added quick draft/publish/close status actions to partner pipeline cards so operators can change job visibility without entering the full job editor.
Added one-click copy actions for signup and job referral links in the partner dashboard so operators can share links without manual selection.
Introduced route-level lazy loading and a shared suspense fallback so the main client bundle is split by page instead of shipping one large upfront chunk.
Added member sorting controls to the partner dashboard so operators can prioritize candidates by recent activity, application volume, coffee chats, or join date.
Added a recent referral link inventory to the partner dashboard so operators can review generated codes, dates, and copy active links without regenerating them.
Hardened self-service profile updates so candidates cannot promote their own role or mark themselves verified, while preserving safe verification submission and auth bootstrap defaults.
Added an admin ops workflow for school verification review with a protected admin RPC, notification/audit logging, and a dedicated operations dashboard route.
Added a resume version browser so users can review stored resume_versions snapshots and load prior drafts back into the editor before saving a new version.
Added a candidate application detail panel with job metadata, status history, cover-note context, and quick actions inside the Supabase-backed dashboard.
Added an admin verification review panel with selected-request signals and quick approve/reject/save actions for faster school verification operations.
Enriched partner candidate spotlight with application cover-note context, attached-resume signals, and job metadata in the applications table without adding new Supabase migrations.
Added an in-app Supabase setup checklist route with migration order, runtime env summary, and admin/setup navigation so operators can verify DB setup without leaving the app.
Added author-only community post editing with a Supabase update helper and inline title/body/tag editor on the post detail page while preserving stable slugs.
Added author-only community comment editing by returning comment author IDs, adding a Supabase update helper, and exposing inline reply edit controls on post detail.
Added explicit resume selection to the job application flow, listing saved resumes and passing the chosen resume_id into applications instead of silently using the latest draft.
Added attached resume visibility to the candidate dashboard application detail by reading applications.resume_id and mapping owned resume title/template/headline metadata.
Added public company directory and company profile pages backed by Supabase companies/jobs data, giving licensed partner content a first-class place without copying proprietary source text.
Connected job cards and job detail company sections to the new company profile routes so company content is discoverable from the public hiring flow.
Added partner-managed company profile editing with a secure Supabase RPC so public company pages can receive authorized company content without copying source text.
Added secure partner resume preview access for submitted applications, letting recruiters inspect attached resume summaries through a company-membership-gated RPC and dashboard UI.
Added partner event notification triggers so company members receive in-app notifications when new applications or coffee chat requests arrive.
Added verification request history with candidate submission and admin review RPC support so school verification changes now keep an auditable request trail.
Added community post/comment reporting with RLS-backed report records, user-facing report actions, and admin open-report metrics.
Added an admin community report queue with target links and status transitions so moderators can process open post/comment reports from the ops dashboard.
Added company team invite tokens with secure create/accept RPCs, partner dashboard invite management, and a protected invite acceptance route.
Added a job review workflow with partner pending-review status, admin job review queue, secure job status RPC, company notifications, and setup migration tracking.
Added company team member visibility to the partner dashboard so invite acceptance and existing company_members are visible alongside recent team invites.
Expanded company profiles with partner-editable tagline, mission, culture, benefits, and hiring-process sections and rendered them on public company detail pages.
Added backwards-compatible company profile select fallback so company directory/detail pages still load before the new 0020 profile-section columns are migrated.
Added company brand asset slots for logo URL, cover image URL, and brand color across partner profile editing, public company pages, migrations, and setup tracking.
Added Supabase Storage-backed company brand image uploads with a company-assets bucket migration, member-scoped storage policies, upload helper, and partner dashboard file inputs.
Added private Supabase Storage resume file attachments with candidate upload UI, resume metadata tracking, partner-visible attachment metadata, and setup migration tracking.
Added private resume attachment signed URL access for candidates and authorized partners, including storage read policy migration and in-app open-file actions.
Added resume file access auditing for signed URL creation, wiring a secure RPC into the private attachment open flow and setup migration list.
